emails.subject: MDEA
emails.body: MDEA Here's a starting point. I've tried to bracket stuff with open issues like this ], but I'm sure there are more questions than ]s. I'm really unclear on the financial aspect of the deal. Reagan, I didn't stop to put the exhibits you sent in, as I thought it was better to get the doc in your hands (and Mr. Fairley's) for a detailed review. Kay

emails.subject: RE: MDEA
emails.body: Well, don't get too excited until you read it. There's lots of stuff I just had to put place holders on, but we'll get it all filled in. Kay To: Rorschach, Reagan; Fairley, David

emails.subject: RE: MDEA
emails.body: Well, don't get too excited until you read it. There's lots of stuff I just had to put place holders on, but we'll get it all filled in. Kay To: Rorschach, Reagan; Fairley, David

emails.subject: RE: MDEA
emails.body: I don't really like the organization of it much. I think things need to be moved around and re-organized. To: Rorschach, Reagan

emails.subject: RE: MDEA
emails.body: I don't really like the organization of it much. I think things need to be moved around and re-organized. To: Rorschach, Reagan

emails.subject: RE: MDEA
emails.body: Kay, I have an outline attached.....a bit of a road map with a few thoughts. I am also sending up the markup I have completed so far. See what you think. Fairley and Ozzie are out of pocket today so we won't get any comments from them today. I need to give Marvin and company an idea of when we will be able to get them something. Wehn do you think we will be ready to give them our first draft?? Thank you-- Reagan To: Rorschach, Reagan

emails.subject: MDEA
emails.body: MDEA I have a 300 meeting, so I'm sending this as is so that David can print a copy. I have not yet integrated all of his changes, although I have dealt with the profit/savings and QSE. Is the scope of scheduling services in the exhibit the same as the Scheduling (aka QSE) stuff? Later, Kay ps Reagan has the latest exhibits.

emails.subject: MDEA
emails.body: MDEA Need exhibit B added. Redlines are against most recent version sent by Reagan.

emails.subject: MDEA
emails.body: MDEA Wilson Montjoy will be in our offices, probably starting around 830 or 900. Any progress? Kay

emails.subject: RE: MDEA
emails.body: RE: MDEA Yes, Wilson tommorrow?? See attached... To: Rorschach, Reagan

emails.subject: RE: MDEA
emails.body: RE: MDEA Yes, Wilson tommorrow?? See attached... To: Rorschach, Reagan

emails.subject: mdea
emails.body: mdea Here's where I am. I haven't finished all of your changes. Please look for bold stuff, that's where I have questions. If no question is given, I'm looking for your confirmation.

emails.subject: MDEA
emails.body: MDEA I haven't heard anything from David or Scott. Have you heard anything from Marvin or Bob? Is there a meeting confirmed for Monday? I'm on another conference call re landfill. Yikes. Kay

emails.subject: RE: MDEA
emails.body: RE: MDEA I spoke with Marvin and Bob yesterday. They did not get the email. You may want to call David and Scott. We are tenative for the Monday meeting. I will confirm with Marvin and Bob today. Reagan C. Rorschach Enron North America 1400 Smith Street Houston, Texas 77002 713.345.3363 To: Rorschach, Reagan
